scripts.build: bun run scripts/generate-types.ts && bun run scripts/generate-schema.ts && tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --outfile dist/clooks src/cli.ts
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: bun run scripts/generate-types.ts && tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/clooks-darwin-arm64 src/cli.ts
scripts.build:darwin-x64: bun run scripts/generate-types.ts && tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/clooks-darwin-x64 src/cli.ts
scripts.lint:all: bun run lint && bun run lint:sh
scripts.test:coverage: script -qc 'CLAUDECODE=1 bun test --coverage' /dev/null 2>&1 | awk '{plain=$0; gsub(/\033\[[0-9;]*m/,"",plain); if(plain !~ /\|  100\.00 \|  100\.00 \|/) print}' && echo '' && echo 'Files that are 100% covered are omitted from coverage output here.'
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:e2e:build && bun run test:e2e:run
scripts.deploy:local: bun run build && cp dist/clooks $(command -v clooks)
